## Validation expectations

- Each packaged directory contains `SKILL.md`, `README.md`, `agents/openai.yaml`, and shared workflow references.
- The command desk package also contains deterministic routing/workflow helper scripts.
- Every archive contains exactly one root skill directory and is below the 25 MB upload limit.
